Brisbane's Choice for Roof Replacements and Restorations

When it comes to the residential roofing sector, Brisbane residents have a clear choice. With a long-standing reputation as a leading provider in the roofing industry, our team of dedicated roofing contractors specialises in roof replacements and restorations, consistently delivering top-quality results to our clients.

Redefining Roof Replacement Services

Our team understands that a roof replacement can transform your home's appearance significantly and add value to your property. Whether you're looking to replace an existing roof or considering a new roof for your property, we ensure a seamless re roofing process. We use state-of-the-art metal roofing materials that are not only durable but also aesthetically pleasing, ensuring your new roof enhances the overall appearance and value of your home.

Trusted Roof Restoration Specialists

As leading roof restoration specialists in Brisbane, we bring old and tired roofs back to life. Our experienced team carefully evaluates each roofing job to provide the best possible solution to our clients. We make your roof look new again, enhancing your home's curb appeal while also ensuring it is ready to withstand Australia's harsh weather conditions.

Exceptional Roof Repairs

In addition to full roof replacements and restorations, we also offer comprehensive roof repair services. We understand the importance of a fully functional roof to safeguard your home and belongings. Whether you have a minor leak or significant damage, getting your roof repaired by our experienced team ensures the longevity of your roof and prevents further issues down the line.

Professional Roofing Contractors

Choosing the right roofing contractors is critical in the roofing industry. Our team of experts not only has the skills and knowledge to perform the task but also understands the unique roofing needs of Brisbane residents. Whether it's a roof replacement, roof restoration, or a minor roof repair, every roofing job is completed with utmost precision and care.

Experience the Difference with Our Re Roofing Services

If you are considering a re roof for your home, our team can guide you through the process, ensuring you make an informed decision that best suits your needs and budget. A new roof can breathe life into your property, significantly increasing its value and aesthetics. Choose us for your re roofing needs and experience a hassle-free, efficient, and professional service.

With our professional and reliable roofing services, you can rest assured that your home's roof is in the safest hands in the Brisbane roofing industry.

Our Services

The guttering was designed to prevent mould and fungus growth, protect siding and stucco from backsplash stains and rot and shield windows and doors from water infiltration and damage. Without maintenance, guttering will gradually wear down, leaving you with a hefty bill should your guttering need to be replaced. If your gutters are looking worse for wear, we recommend getting in contact to arrange a free inspection and quote for preventative maintenance.

GUTTERING REPAIRS

Several different guttering repair services are available, your guttering may need one or a few of these services. Services include:

  • Gutter cleaning
  • Gutter painting
  • Gutter replacement
  • Gutter guard
  • Clearing blocked gutters

TYPES OF GUTTERING

Different types of guttering are available, and it will often depend on the property's age as to which guttering is used. Guttering materials include:

  • Steel
  • Aluminium
  • Zinc
  • Colorbond

LEAKING GUTTERS CAN CAUSE SERIOUS DAMAGE

A leaking roof or gutter can cause severe structural damage if it's not repaired. Signs of a water leak can include stains or mold on your ceiling, wet insulation and water pooling inside your property. If leaks in your roof or gutters are not repaired quickly, the problem will likely escalate, causing damage to your walls, fittings, furniture, and house structure. The extent of damage can be reduced along with repair costs if we fix the problems when they occur, instead of leaving it until it's too late.

Get Started

Affordable Roof Repairs In Brisbane

Schedule A Service
Button

STORM DAMAGE vs Guttering Brisbane

Storms are responsible for most of the roof and gutter repairs that we get called out to fix. Apart from the obvious things such as breaks and cracks and tin sheets or roof tiles blowing off, heavy rain and wind can cause water to move differently down your roof then it usually would – which can result in leaks and floods.


If you've been unfortunate enough to suffer damage on your roof or gutters as a result of a storm, call us right away, and we'll send one of our experienced technicians to your home or business at a time that fits in with you.


They'll give you an honest appraisal of the situation and make sure that you understand the work involved. We'll never talk you into having work done that isn't necessary.

Learn More

MINOR Gutter Repair Brisbane

If, on inspection, your gutters appear to be pretty sound but are showing signs of wear or tear, then in most instances, we recommend repair over gutter replacement since this is typically the cheapest alternative.


We'll assess the level of damage and discuss whether a repair is possible. If your repair is only minor, then most times, we can fix it within a day. For major repair work or huge property, then it's more likely to take up to 3 days.

Button
Button

LEARN MORE

Gutter Replacement Brisbane

Our team of highly trained contractors has the experience to install new guttering on both residential and commercial properties. We recommend Colorbond steel gutter systems that deliver long-lasting performance when properly installed and maintained. Available in 22 colours, there's sure to be one to match or complement your existing décor.


Sometimes, however, we're limited to the type of guttering we can use based on the way the property has been constructed or the property's siding. Still, wherever possible, we'll install guttering to suit your preference and budget. Is your roof leaking? Do you need a new downpipe fitting? Or is a section of your guttering rusty? Trust us with your roof or gutter job.

Our Services

The guttering was designed to prevent mould and fungus growth, protect siding and stucco from backsplash stains and rot and shield windows and doors from water infiltration and damage. Without maintenance, guttering will gradually wear down, leaving you with a hefty bill should your guttering need to be replaced. If your gutters are looking worse for wear, we recommend getting in contact to arrange a free inspection and quote for preventative maintenance.

## GUTTERING REPAIRS

Several differentguttering repair servicesare available, your guttering may need one or a few of these services. Services include:

- Gutter cleaning
- Gutter painting
- Gutter replacement
- Gutter guard
- Clearing blocked gutters

## TYPES OF GUTTERING

Different types of guttering are available, and it will often depend on the property's age as to which guttering is used. Guttering materials include:

- Steel
- Aluminium
- Zinc
- Colorbond

## LEAKING GUTTERS CAN CAUSE SERIOUS DAMAGE

A leaking roof or gutter can cause severe structural damage if it's not repaired. Signs of a water leak can include stains or mold on your ceiling, wet insulation and water pooling inside your property. If leaks in your roof or gutters are not repaired quickly, the problem will likely escalate, causing damage to your walls, fittings, furniture, and house structure. The extent of damage can be reduced along with repair costs if we fix the problems when they occur, instead of leaving it until it's too late.

## STORM DAMAGE vs Guttering Brisbane

Storms are responsible for most of the[roof and gutter repairs](https://www.thebrisbaneroofrepairers.com/)that we get called out to fix. Apart from the obvious things such as breaks and cracks and tin sheets or roof tiles blowing off, heavy rain and wind can cause water to move differently down your roof then it usually would – which can result in leaks and floods.

If you've been unfortunate enough to suffer damage on your roof or gutters as a result of a storm, call us right away, and we'll send one of our experienced technicians to your home or business at a time that fits in with you.

They'll give you an honest appraisal of the situation and make sure that you understand the work involved. We'll never talk you into having work done that isn't necessary.

Learn More

## MINOR Gutter Repair Brisbane

If, on inspection, your gutters appear to be pretty sound but are showing signs of wear or tear, then in most instances, we recommend repair over gutter replacement since this is typically the cheapest alternative.

We'll assess the level of damage and discuss whether a repair is possible. If your repair is only minor, then most times, we can fix it within a day. For major repair work or huge property, then it's more likely to take up to 3 days.

Our Services

We are all aware that roofs need to be built to last. Unfortunately, even the most modern roof structures do encounter problems from time to time and may require Brisbane Roof Repairs. This is even more relevant if you live within an area prone to inclement weather such as Queensland.

Some issues that can impact the performance and reliability of a Brisbane roof include:

  • Physical damage such as if impacted during a storm
  • Potential structural concerns such as sagging
  • Leaks and problems with pooling water
  • Loose, damaged or missing shingles
  • Cracked or broken tiles

Much like any other home-based problem, some circumstances will not go away on their own. If left unchecked, even minor issues will quickly transform into major and costly roof repairs.


This is why it is always better to consult with a professional roofing company if you suspect that your roof has suffered any damage. The unchecked necessary repairs can require a roof restoration or, in the worst cases, entire roof replacement.

Button

Frequently Asked Questions about Brisbane Roof Repairs

  • How do I know if I should book in for Professional roof repair services?

    • There are broken or missing tiles or metal sheeting
    • Major leaks during rain
    • Hearing drips during a light shower of rain
    • Damp spots on your ceiling
    • Hearing tapping or flapping noises during wind
    • you have a very old roof

  • What Happens When You Don’t Get Roof Repairs Done?

    Roof structures are tricky. You may see a problem from the outside and think it is not a significant issue. Roof damage often looks minor but will have a costly impact if left unattended. One missing roof tile can lead to a leaking roof. This leads to water damage and moisture within the internal structure, leading to mould in the roof and down the walls. All this from one broken tile!


    Another problem we see is called ‘Blistering’. This is when the surface of the roof starts to erode from poor installation and lack of maintenance. When this spreads, you are looking at a massive roof replacement expense instead of spending a smaller amount on a roof repair.


    WARNING – If your roof is currently damaged and you don’t repair the existing issues, your insurance company will likely not cover you in the future because of pre-existing damage. By repairing and maintaining your roof, you will be covering yourself for any future insurance claims.

  • How long does it take to repair a roof?

    This will depend on the extent of the damage that’s occurred. If for example your roof was damaged in a storm or a tree has fallen and caused damage this will be a much larger job than simply replacing a few cracked tiles or replacing some metal sheeting.

EVERY QUEENSLAND HOME NEEDS ROOF VENTILATION

If you live anywhere with a warm or tropical climate, a whirlybird is necessary for your home. Whirlybirds are relatively maintenance-free, after the initial cost of supply and installation there are little to no ongoing costs. They also help assist your air-conditioning to do its job in cooling the home. Whirlybirds assist in moving hot air out of your roof cavity to allow the rest of your home to cool easier.

NEXT STEPS

Installing a roof ventilator is simple. However, we do advise having the whirlybird installation carried out by a qualified roofer. And why not kill two birds with one stone? We will carry out a free roof inspection before installation and let you know if there are any problems with your roof which might need attention at some stage. Frequently Asked Questions

  • What’s the purpose of whirlybirds?

    Whirlybirds are wind-driven roof ventilators that do not require any power that aid in significantly cooling your home. They are low maintenance and do more than cool your roof cavity. We are trusted whirlybird installers Brisbane.

  • How do whirlybirds work?

    Roof ventilators work by sucking hot air up and out through the roof, reducing the temperature in your home by as much as 20 degrees in summer! The Whirly bird has long been a staple in Brisbane properties due to our extreme heats. 

  • Does a whirlybird need wind to work?

    No. This is a common misconception among Brisbane homeowners. Whirlybirds do not require high wind speeds to be able to work efficiently. Whirlybirds work with or without high wind speeds and help the home to breathe.

  • How Many Whirlybirds Do I Need?

    A general guide is 1-2 Whirlybirds per 90m2 of roof space. However, this is a rough guide with elements such as the pitch of your roof and roof cavities changing the number of whirlybirds needing to be installed. ## Frequently Asked Questions

- ### What’s the purpose of whirlybirds?



















Whirlybirds are wind-driven roof ventilators that do not require any power that aid in significantly cooling your home. They are low maintenance and do more than cool your roof cavity. We are trusted whirlybird installers Brisbane.

- ### How do whirlybirds work?



















Roof ventilators work by sucking hot air up and out through the roof, reducing the temperature in your home by as much as 20 degrees in summer! The Whirly bird has long been a staple in Brisbane properties due to our extreme heats.

- ### Does a whirlybird need wind to work?



















No. This is a common misconception among Brisbane homeowners. Whirlybirds do not require high wind speeds to be able to work efficiently. Whirlybirds work with or without high wind speeds and help the home to breathe.

- ### How Many Whirlybirds Do I Need?



















A general guide is 1-2 Whirlybirds per 90m2 of roof space. Our Services

A tiled roof is very heavy, with gravity creating a gradual but persistent downward force. It is exposed to extreme seasonal temperatures. The combination of the two creates movement, which over time adds up to a significant shift in the position of the entire roof. This movement forces the cement used to waterproof and fixes ridge cappings to crack and break away, which means that water can easily leak through the broken or missing cement.

The thermal and stress forces on a tiled roof do also result in individual tiles cracking, which may be difficult to see from the ground, but can cause significant water leaks. The appearance of a tiled roof also declines over time due to a build-up of mould, lichens, dust and grime, including bacteria loaded bird droppings.


This causes significant issues for rainwater and drinking quality. If your Brisbane Roof tiles appear to be in poor condition from the ground, then it probably is, and it will certainly pay to get it inspected as soon as possible. At the very least, an excellent clean & restoration will dramatically improve the appearance and value of your home.

What We Do

Thorough Restoration and Tile Roof Replacement

Button

In general, our thorough tile replacement process involves several steps of cleaning, repairing and re-coating a tiled roof. These various stages are essential as they ensure the best possible results, particularly when carried out using the top quality products.


The process usually consists of the following steps:

  • Replacement of broken tiles
  • Installation of Valley Seal
  • Pressure cleaning of roof
  • Removal of old mortar
  • Re-cementing of all capping
  • Installation of weep holes
  • Sweeping off mortar
  • Application of Flexipoint
  • Removal of any grit
  • Application of sealer coat
  • Application of colour coats

The Benefits of Roof Restoration

Hiring a reputable firm such as Brisbane Tile Roof Restorations to restore your roof will ensure that your roof is entirely storm and weatherproof. It will also save you the cost of future repairs. In addition, this process will boost the appearance of your home and immediately increase the capital value of your property.

Why You Can Only Trust the Experts

Unfortunately, many inexperienced and unqualified firms claim to do roof restorations. This means that up to half of all roof restorations jobs carried out by roofing companies don’t solve the original problem identified by the homeowner.


That is why you can only afford to trust reputable experts such as Brisbane Tile Roof Restorations – we have the proper qualifications and many years of experience in the roofing industry.

Our Services

A tiled roof is very heavy, with gravity creating a gradual but persistent downward force. It is exposed to extreme seasonal temperatures. The combination of the two creates movement, which over time adds up to a significant shift in the position of the entire roof. This movement forces the cement used to waterproof and fixes ridge cappings to crack and break away, which means that water can easily leak through the broken or missing cement.

The thermal and stress forces on a tiled roof do also result in individual tiles cracking, which may be difficult to see from the ground, but can cause significant water leaks. The appearance of a tiled roof also declines over time due to a build-up of mould, lichens, dust and grime, including bacteria loaded bird droppings.

This causes significant issues for rainwater and drinking quality. If your Brisbane Roof tiles appear to be in poor condition from the ground, then it probably is, and it will certainly pay to get it inspected as soon as possible. At the very least, an excellent clean & restoration will dramatically improve the appearance and value of your home.

Roof Inspection

Brisbane Roof Inspection

Home > Roof Inspection

Operated by Prostar Roofing

Our Services

Your roof is one of the essential parts of your home's structural stability, and it's also the most prone to damage from the elements and falling debris. Our Brisbane roof inspection service is designed to catch and correct potential roofing issues before they become significant problems. Ignoring the signs of a faulty roof could lead to expensive repairs in the future.

WHAT IS A ROOF INSPECTION and Report

When you climb a ladder and stand on an elevated spot, you will not be able to see everything on your roof, especially if it is not flat. You would need to walk around the entire surface and check every tile, gutter, flashing, downspout, vent, chimney, and all other components attached to the roof. We pay close attention to the roofing material as it can take a beating from bad weather, falling tree branches, or flying debris carried by a storm.


A Brisbane roof inspection examines wear and tear, estimates a roof's lifespan, and recommends repairs if necessary. The inspector should be able to identify roof features that are unsafe or in poor condition. By detecting flaws early, roof inspections can help you save a significant amount on maintenance and operational costs. Roof inspections might also reveal an opportunity to switch to a more sustainable and environment-friendly roofing material – leading to long-term savings.

Button

Don't Let Minor Roof Issues Become Major Problems

Having regular inspections and keeping on top of general maintenance, including pressure cleaning and replacing loose or cracked tiles, can expand the lifespan of your roof while minimising your risk of expensive roof damage. Other roof inspection companies may charge you for this service but we offer high-quality inspections and reports.

How Do You Know Your Roof Is Leaking?

Leak detection can be complicated because your roof is typically blocked with insulation and other lines of defence. However, there are a few signs you can look out for, including:

  • Water stains on the roof or ceiling
  • Locating a drip in your home
  • Water spots on exterior walls
  • Moss or mould
  • Missing shingles
  • Debris in your downspouts

The easiest way to locate a leak in your roof is by calling a roofman for a comprehensive inspection.

Our Services

Choose Your Roof Colours Or Freshen Up Your Existing Roof Colour!

These days there are hundreds of roof colours to choose from that roof painting in Brisbane has become one of our most popular roofing services. Many Homeowners in Brisbane are ready to update their homes, whether it's a Queenslander heritage home or modern design. A new coat of paint does wonders for a roof and the properties value. Getting a fresh new colour or a repaint of the same colour can brighten up a home and your neighbours will love it. Roof painting is so much more than just buying a tin of roof paint and sprucing up your existing roof!

Years Of Experience

Your roof works hard, real hard. It battles the elements 365 days a year, and after years of protecting your home, your roof will begin to show signs of wear and tear; this is expected and a normal part of homeownership. Your roof needs to be maintained, and it is our job to ensure your roof is in top shape before painting!


Before we paint a roof, our qualified roof painters need to assess your roof for any damage. Should there be no existing damage good news, we will need to give the roof a good pressure clean to remove any debris and dirt.

Why Choose Us as Your Roof Painter

PROFESSIONAL AND TRUSTED

We have proven records of accomplishment and are a trusted & reputable roofing company in Brisbane, Australia. We ensure that all projects are done with professionalism using quality materials and workmanship.

HONEST AND DEPENDABLE

We strive to complete all projects with integrity, not just with our clients but also with our suppliers and contractors. We arrive when we say we will and stand by our reputation.

COMMITMENT TO QUALITY

We commit to completing all projects within the timeline set with our clients. We use the newest technology and tools to ensure that all jobs are done quickly while also paying attention to detail to ensure the quality outcome you expect.

LICENSED PROFESSIONALS

Our network of Licensed Local Roofers in Brisbane are fully licensed and insured. We cannot stress enough how important this is when looking for leading roofing specialists to work on your home.

Learn More

Frequently Asked Questions

  • What factors will affect my roof painting cost?

    There isn't a flat fee for roof painting, as every job is different. But some common factors will play a big role in determining your final cost.


    These include the following:


    • size of your roof
    • condition of your roof

  • What does painting a roof involve?

    If you don't know very much about painting a roof, you may assume it involves opening a tin of paint, grabbing a brush, and getting to work. But there is far more involved in painting a roof than just slapping on paint. So beware of people who quote very low prices, as you may—literally—just be getting a coat of paint! Once we get a nice clean surface, we will repaint and coat your roof with your chosen colours. You will be over the moon with the result, and you have a warranty for the next 10 years!
